close_reason: Implemented reindeer integration with cargoLockFile option
description:
The current gen-rust-buck.py approach has limitations:
- No feature resolution
- No build script support
- Complex proc-macro crates fail (serde_derive, etc.)

Facebook's reindeer tool (https://github.com/facebookincubator/reindeer) properly handles:
- Feature resolution
- Build scripts (via rust_build_script rules)
- Platform-specific compilation
- All Cargo edge cases

## Implementation Status

Reindeer integration is now implemented in `nix/buck2/rust-deps-cell-reindeer.nix` with:

1. **Cargo.lock parsing** - Extracts all crates.io packages from Cargo.lock
2. **Fixed-output derivation for vendoring** - Network access for cargo vendor
3. **Reindeer buckify** - Generates Buck2 rules with proper features, deps, proc_macro
4. **Build script fixups** - Common crates configured to skip build scripts
5. **Post-processing** - Splits single BUCK file into per-crate files for compatibility
6. **Dep rewriting** - Handles deps, named_deps, platform_deps

### Known Limitations

- Crates using `include!()` macros for data files (e.g., icu_properties_data) need additional handling
- Test/example/bench directories are removed to avoid crate_root detection issues

### Usage

```nix
turnkey.toolchains.buck2 = {
  enable = true;
  cargoLockFile = ./Cargo.lock;
  cargoVendorHash = "sha256-...";  # Get from build failure
};
```

### Files

- `nix/buck2/rust-deps-cell-reindeer.nix` - Main implementation
- `nix/buck2/split-reindeer-buck.py` - Post-processing script
- `nix/flake-parts/turnkey/default.nix` - Added cargoLockFile/cargoVendorHash options
title: Integrate reindeer for full Cargo compatibility in rustdeps cell
